base.heading: Basic Text Area
base.text: Demonstrates the standard textarea with valid and invalid states using the field component with multiline enabled.

helper-text.heading: Textarea with Helper Text
helper-text.text: Shows a textarea with helper text displayed below the field to guide the user on what to enter.

with-value.heading: Textarea with Pre-filled Value
with-value.text: Renders a textarea pre-populated with an existing value, useful for editing scenarios.

invalid-message.heading: Textarea with Validation Error Message
invalid-message.text: Displays a textarea in the invalid state with a descriptive validation error message rendered below the field.

disabled.heading: Disabled Textarea
disabled.text: Renders a textarea in a disabled state, preventing user interaction while displaying existing content.

hide-label.heading: Textarea with Hidden Label
hide-label.text: Demonstrates a textarea with a visually hidden label that remains accessible to screen readers, using the placeholder as the visible cue.
